quick.text: Show our current cash position across all bank accounts and flag any currency concentration risk.
quick.reason: Treasury pulls positions from Keystone Treasury and balances from Halcyon Bank, then summarizes exposure by currency.

quick.text: Pull the AR aging report and tell me which customers are more than 60 days overdue.
quick.reason: Receivables reads aging buckets from Core Billing and highlights the overdue accounts with open balances.

quick.text: Get a trial balance from the ledger and point out any accounts that look out of balance.
quick.reason: Close pulls the trial balance from Slate Ledger and reviews debit/credit tie-out per account.

quick.text: Quote a conversion of 250,000 EUR to USD and show the current reference rate.
quick.reason: Treasury fetches a live quote from Cordoba FX and the reference rate from Pulse Market for comparison.

quick.text: List open vendor bills in the ERP and summarize what we owe by vendor.
quick.reason: A single worker lists bills from Ironbark ERP and groups payables by vendor and due date.

workflow.text: Onboard Crestview Software as a new vendor: run KYB screening, pull their contract terms, and register them for payment.
workflow.reason: Vendor Lifecycle runs Aegis Screening for KYB, fetches terms from Atlas Vendor, then registers the vendor record.

workflow.text: Run the period close: reconcile ledger accounts, compute accruals, post the journal entries, and close the period.
workflow.reason: Period Close drives Slate Ledger end-to-end - reconciliation, accruals, journal posting, and the close itself.

workflow.text: Run a dunning cycle on overdue receivables and send notices to every customer past 30 days.
workflow.reason: Receivables runs the dunning cycle in Core Billing and delivers notices through Vela Notify with delivery tracking.

workflow.text: Create a purchase requisition for 20 engineering laptops, route it through the approval chain, and issue the purchase order.
workflow.reason: Procurement checks budget in Junction Procure, resolves the approver chain via Lumen Identity, then issues the PO.

workflow.text: Assess our FX exposure and place hedges wherever exposure exceeds policy thresholds.
workflow.reason: Treasury reads exposure from Keystone Treasury, checks market rates, and places hedges - sensitive steps pause for approval.

workflow.text: Run AML monitoring on this week's transactions and screen any flagged parties against sanctions lists.
workflow.reason: Compliance monitors transactions in Verafin Monitor and batch-screens flagged parties through Aegis Screening.

pipeline.text: Process the pending vendor invoices end-to-end: extract the documents, match them against the ERP, screen the vendors, then schedule payment.
pipeline.reason: Spans four services - Inkwell OCR extraction, Ironbark ERP matching, Aegis vendor screening, and payment submission with an approval gate.

pipeline.text: Pay our overseas vendors: get FX quotes, convert the funds, settle through the FX rail, and send payment confirmations.
pipeline.reason: Cross-border settlement through Cordoba FX with remittance advice via Vela Notify; the settlement step requires approval.

pipeline.text: Close the quarter: reconcile the ledger, compute accruals, tie out the trial balance, then prepare the control attestations.
pipeline.reason: Period Close hands off to Compliance - Slate Ledger reconciliation and accruals followed by attestations in Verafin Monitor.

pipeline.text: Investigate Apex Infrastructure: pull their vendor profile, compliance status, open bills, payment history, and recent supplier activity.
pipeline.reason: Fans out across Atlas Vendor, Ironbark ERP, Meridian Pay, and Beacon CRM, then merges findings into one vendor report.

pipeline.text: Prepare this quarter's regulatory filing: run transaction monitoring, screen counterparties, draft the filing, and submit it.
pipeline.reason: Compliance & Risk end-to-end - Verafin monitoring, Aegis batch screening, filing preparation, and gated submission.
